_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 17: Quality Management System
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded by the CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard.
_metadata.awaiting_standard: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 17 (expected Q4 2026)

requirements.title: Documented Quality Management System
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST establish and maintain a documented QMS covering all 13 aspects of Art. 17(1).
requirements.rationale: Art. 17(1) mandates a systematic, documented QMS.
required_content: Procedure documents for each applicable aspect

requirements.title: Development QA and Testing
requirements.requirement: The QMS MUST include development quality assurance and testing procedures.
requirements.rationale: Art. 17(1)(c)(d) requires QC/QA and testing procedures.
acceptable_implementations: CI/CD pipeline with automated testing stages
Code review processes with documented standards
Unit, integration, and system testing frameworks
Test plans with defined pass/fail criteria

requirements.title: Data Management Procedures
requirements.requirement: The QMS MUST include comprehensive data management procedures.
requirements.rationale: Art. 17(1)(f) requires data management covering the full data lifecycle.

requirements.title: Accountability Framework
requirements.requirement: The QMS MUST include an accountability framework defining roles and responsibilities.
requirements.rationale: Art. 17(1)(m) requires clear accountability for all QMS aspects.
acceptable_implementations: RACI matrix covering all 13 QMS aspects

scoring.compliant: R01 + R02 + R03 + R04 all met
scoring.partial: R01 met + at least one of R02-R04 met
